description: Synthetic Saudi claim denials for pipeline development. Generated from official NPHIES adjudication-reason codes. All patients, providers, and policy numbers are fictional. Payer names used generically for realism.
usage: Feed 'denial_letter_text' into the parse->classify->appeal pipeline; use the structured fields as ground truth for evaluation.

denials.denial_reason_en: Preauthorization is required and was not obtained
denials.denial_letter_text: Dear Provider, Reference claim CLM-2026-018834 for member 400129xxxx, service date 12/05/2026. The claim for MRI Lumbar Spine (SAR 1,850.00) has been REJECTED. Reason code BE-1-4: Preauthorization is required and was not obtained. Services above SAR 500 require prior approval per your network agreement. You may appeal within 30 days with supporting documentation.

ground_truth.appeal_angle: Emergency exception: symptoms indicated urgent neurological assessment; attach ER referral note and physician justification. Alternatively demonstrate pre-auth was requested via portal (attach timestamp) but response exceeded payer SLA.

denials.denial_reason_en: Service/procedure exceeds number of times per policy
denials.denial_letter_text: عزيزي مقدم الخدمة، بالإشارة إلى المطالبة رقم BPA-77120-26. تم رفض المطالبة الخاصة بجلسات العلاج الطبيعي (8 جلسات - 2,400 ريال). سبب الرفض CV-3-4: تتجاوز الخدمة عدد المرات المسموح به لكل وثيقة تأمين. Policy allows 12 physiotherapy sessions per membership year; member has utilized 10. يمكنكم تقديم استئناف خلال 30 يوماً.

ground_truth.appeal_angle: Partial approval argument: 2 of 8 sessions remain within the annual limit — request payment for the 2 covered sessions. For the remainder, submit medical necessity justification post-arthroscopy per treating physician plan.

denials.denial_reason_en: Consultation is within 14-day follow up period
denials.denial_letter_text: Claim MG-2026-40221 rejected. Member seen by same specialty on 02/06/2026; current visit 11/06/2026 falls within the 14-day follow-up window and is considered part of the original consultation fee. Reason code CV-1-9.

ground_truth.appeal_angle: New complaint argument: visit on 11/06 addressed a NEW presenting complaint (document chief complaint difference in clinical notes), therefore constitutes a new consultation, not follow-up. Attach both encounter notes.

denials.denial_letter_text: تم رفض المطالبة رقم CLM-2026-019102. سبب الرفض CV-4-8: إعادة وصف الأدوية قبل وقتها المحدد. آخر صرف للدواء بتاريخ 2026/05/20 لمدة 90 يوم. لا يمكن إعادة الصرف قبل 2026/08/10.

ground_truth.appeal_angle: Dose change: physician increased dose from 10mg to 20mg on new prescription, making prior supply invalid. Attach new prescription and clinical note documenting the dose change.

denials.denial_reason_en: Investigation result is inadequate or missing
denials.denial_letter_text: Dear Provider, claim BPA-88103-26 for laparoscopic cholecystectomy (SAR 28,500) has been rejected under code SE-1-6: Investigation result is inadequate or missing. Ultrasound report confirming cholelithiasis was not attached to the submission. Please provide complete diagnostic evidence.

ground_truth.appeal_angle: Highest win-rate category: simply attach the ultrasound report (dated pre-surgery) plus LFT results and resubmit with a cover letter referencing the original claim. Documentation existed; it was an attachment failure.

denials.denial_reason_en: Service is not clinically justified based on clinical practice guideline, without additional supporting diagnosis
denials.denial_letter_text: Claim ML-2026-1187 rejected. Reason MN-1-1: الخدمة غير مبررة طبياً بناءً على إرشادات الممارسة الكلينيكية. Vitamin D injection not justified without lab evidence of deficiency. Oral supplementation is first-line per clinical guidelines.

ground_truth.appeal_angle: Attach lab result showing 25-OH vitamin D < 12 ng/mL (severe deficiency) and document malabsorption/failed oral therapy to justify injectable route per guideline exception.

denials.denial_reason_en: Physical examination is inadequate or missing
denials.denial_letter_text: Claim CLM-2026-021009 rejected under SE-1-4: Physical examination is inadequate or missing. Dental chart and pre-operative radiograph not provided. Resubmit with clinical examination findings and periapical X-ray.

ground_truth.appeal_angle: Attach dental chart and periapical radiograph showing carious lesion on tooth 36. Straightforward documentation appeal.

denials.denial_reason_en: Work related injury is not covered
denials.denial_letter_text: تم رفض المطالبة ART-2026-3320. سبب الرفض CV-1-10: إصابة العمل غير مشمولة بالتأمين. تشير ملاحظات الفحص إلى أن الإصابة حدثت أثناء العمل، وبالتالي تقع ضمن مسؤولية التأمينات الاجتماعية (GOSI) وليس التأمين الصحي.

ground_truth.appeal_angle: Challenge the injury classification: clinical note documents injury occurred during recreational football, not work. Attach corrected history-of-injury statement signed by patient and physician.

denials.denial_letter_text: Claim BPA-90112-26 partially rejected. Biopsy line item (SAR 850) denied under AD-1-4: Diagnosis is inconsistent with service/procedure. Submitted diagnosis L82.1 (seborrheic keratosis) does not support diagnostic biopsy. Consultation approved.

ground_truth.appeal_angle: Coding correction: biopsy was performed to rule out melanoma given atypical features (document dermoscopy findings). Principal diagnosis should be D48.5 (neoplasm of uncertain behavior). Correct coding and appeal with dermoscopy report.

denials.denial_reason_en: Duplicate service/procedure code based on the date
denials.denial_letter_text: Claim MG-2026-41577 rejected. Reason AD-2-4: Duplicate service/procedure code based on the date. CBC billed twice on the same service date 15/06/2026.

ground_truth.appeal_angle: Not appealable as-is: correct the claim by removing the duplicate line and resubmit. If both CBCs were genuinely performed (pre/post procedure), document times and clinical reason.

denials.denial_reason_en: Service/procedure may be appropriate, but too frequent
denials.denial_letter_text: المطالبة CLM-2026-022415 مرفوضة. السبب CV-3-2: قد تكون الخدمة مناسبة ولكنها متكررة جداً. This is the 4th growth ultrasound this trimester; policy covers routine scans per ANC schedule (one per trimester unless clinically indicated).

ground_truth.appeal_angle: Clinical indication: scans ordered for suspected IUGR monitoring (document fundal height discrepancy and prior scan percentiles). Attach obstetrician's monitoring plan showing medical indication beyond routine ANC.

denials.denial_letter_text: Claim WL-2026-0871 rejected. Reason AD-1-9: Mismatch in member information. Member name on claim does not match insurer records (spelling variance in Latin transliteration). Verify member identity and resubmit.

ground_truth.appeal_angle: Not an appeal — data fix. Match the name exactly to the insurance card transliteration, verify member ID, resubmit. Flag for the scrubbing module: transliteration mismatches are a preventable denial class in bilingual records.

denials.denial_reason_en: Treatment plan is inadequate or missing
denials.denial_letter_text: Claim BPA-91240-26 for Adalimumab (SAR 7,200) rejected under SE-1-8: Treatment plan is inadequate or missing. Biologic therapy requires rheumatologist treatment plan including prior DMARD history, disease activity score, and monitoring schedule.

ground_truth.appeal_angle: High-value appeal: attach rheumatologist treatment plan documenting failed methotrexate/sulfasalazine trial, DAS28 score, and TB screening results. Biologic denials reverse frequently when full protocol documentation is provided.

denials.denial_reason_en: History of present illness is inadequate or missing
denials.denial_letter_text: عزيزي مقدم الخدمة، المطالبة SNI-2026-5501 مرفوضة بموجب الرمز SE-1-2: تاريخ المرض الحالي غير كاف أو مفقود. Echo justification requires documented HPI: chest pain characteristics, duration, exertional relationship. Submitted note contains chief complaint only.

ground_truth.appeal_angle: Attach the full clinical note with structured HPI (onset, character, radiation, exertional component, risk factors). If the HPI was documented but not transmitted, state this and attach the complete encounter record.

denials.denial_reason_en: Service/procedure does not meet the criteria of urgency criteria
denials.denial_letter_text: Claim CLM-2026-025118 rejected. Reason CV-1-5: Service does not meet urgency criteria. Admission via ER without pre-authorization; clinical parameters submitted (SpO2 96%, CURB-65 = 0) do not support inpatient level of care. Outpatient management was appropriate.

ground_truth.appeal_angle: Contest the severity assessment: attach serial vitals showing deterioration (document the SpO2 trend, fever curve, failed oral antibiotics), comorbidities, and treating physician's admission rationale. CURB-65 alone does not capture clinical judgment per guidelines.

denials.denial_letter_text: تم رفض المطالبة MG-2026-42901. السبب CV-1-4: الخدمة/الإجراء غير مغطاة. فحوصات الحساسية الشاملة غير مدرجة ضمن منافع الوثيقة. الرجاء مراجعة جدول المنافع.

ground_truth.appeal_angle: Check CHI unified policy minimum benefits: diagnostic testing for documented allergic disease may fall under covered diagnostics when clinically indicated (recurrent urticaria/anaphylaxis history). Cite the specific policy schedule clause and CHI minimum benefit table.
